Please analyze this codebase and create a CLAUDE.md file, which will be given to future instances of Claude Code to operate in this repository.

What to add:
1. Commands that will be commonly used, such as how to build, lint, and run tests. Include the necessary commands to develop in this codebase, such as how to run a single test.
2. High-level code architecture and structure so that future instances can be productive more quickly. Focus on the "big picture" architecture that requires reading multiple files to understand.

Usage notes:
- If there's already a CLAUDE.md, suggest improvements to it.
- When you make the initial CLAUDE.md, do not repeat yourself and do not include obvious instructions like "Provide helpful error messages to users", "Write unit tests for all new utilities", "Never include sensitive information (API keys, tokens) in code or commits".
- Avoid listing every component or file structure that can be easily discovered.
- Don't include generic development practices.
- If there are Cursor rules (in .cursor/rules/ or .cursorrules) or Copilot rules (in .github/copilot-instructions.md), make sure to include the important parts.
- If there is a README.md, make sure to include the important parts.
- Do not make up information such as "Common Development Tasks", "Tips for Development", "Support and Documentation" unless this is expressly included in other files that you read.
- Be sure to prefix the file with the following text:

```
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
```

# Getting Started
Install cmake 3.21.1+ on ubuntu 22.04, download cmake 3.21.1+, please see:
```
https://cmake.org/download/
```
```
sudo apt-get install cmake
```
Install clang-12
```
sudo apt-get install clang-12
```
Dowload NDK r22+, please see:
```
https://github.com/android/ndk/wiki/Unsupported-Downloads
```

## Build For Ubuntu
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS="10 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18"

Required:
./script/build.sh
```

## Build For MacOS
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS="10 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18"

Required:
./script/build_macos.sh
```

## Build For Android
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export BUILD_ANDROID_ABIS="arm64-v8a armeabi-v7a x86_64 x86"
export BUILD_ANDROID_PLATFORM="android-30"

Required:
export ANDROID_NDK_HOME=<NDK_DIR>
./script/build_android.sh
```

# MCP Server
```
claude mcp add core-parser --scope user <path_to/core-parser> -- --mcp
```

# HTTP Server
```
core-parser --http [ip:port]
```

# How To Launch
```
Usage: core-parser [OPTION]
Option:
    -c, --core <COREFILE>    load core-parser from corefile
    -p, --pid <PID>          load core-parser from target process
    -m, --machine <ARCH>     arch support arm64, arm, x86_64, x86, riscv64
        --sdk <SDK>          sdk support 26 ~ 36
        --no-filter-any      load core-parser no filter any vma
    -t, --tomb <TOMBSTONE>   load core-parser form tombstone file
        --sysroot <DIR:DIR>  set sysroot path
        --va_bits <BITS>     set virtual valid addr bits
        --page_size <SIZE>   set target core page size
        --no-load            no auto load corefile
        --no-fake-phdr [EXE] rebuild fakecore phdr
Exp:
    core-parser -c /tmp/tmp.core
    core-parser -p 1 -m arm64
    core-parser -t tombstone_00 --sysroot symbols
```

## Allocate a Virtual Memory Segment
```

    -w, --write      set load block writable flags (default)
    -x, --exec       set load block executable flags
    -n, --none       set load block none flags

New overlay [7fd10b0000, 7fd10b4000)

# Dependencies
[Capstone Disassembly Framework](https://github.com/capstone-engine/capstone)
[XZ Utils](https://github.com/tukaani-project/xz)
[HttpLib](https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib)
[Zstd](https://github.com/facebook/zstd)

# Techincal System
![core-analysis](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreAnalysisKit/refs/heads/main/doc/OpenCoreAnalyzer.jpg)

| Project      | Path                                              |
|:------------:|---------------------------------------------------|
|core-parser   | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreAnalysisKit  |
|linux-parser  | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenLinuxAnalysisKit |
|crash-android | https://github.com/Penguin38/crash-android        |
|OpenCoreSDK   | https://github.com/Penguin38/OpenCoreSDK          |

# Getting Started
Install cmake 3.21.1+ on ubuntu 22.04, download cmake 3.21.1+, please see:
```
https://cmake.org/download/
```
```
sudo apt-get install cmake
```
Install clang-12
```
sudo apt-get install clang-12
```
Dowload NDK r22+, please see:
```
https://github.com/android/ndk/wiki/Unsupported-Downloads
```

## Build For Ubuntu
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS="10 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18"

Required:
./script/build.sh
```

## Build For MacOS
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS="10 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18"

Required:
./script/build_macos.sh
```

## Build For Android
```
Optional:
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
export BUILD_ANDROID_ABIS="arm64-v8a armeabi-v7a x86_64 x86"
export BUILD_ANDROID_PLATFORM="android-30"

Required:
export ANDROID_NDK_HOME=<NDK_DIR>
./script/build_android.sh
```

# Build Artifacts

| Platform          | Path |
|:------------:|-----|
|Emulator| output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/android/x86_64/bin/core-parser</br>output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/android/x86/bin/core-parser    |
|Phone| output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/android/arm64-v8a/bin/core-parser</br>output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/android/armeabi-v7a/bin/core-parser|
|Ubuntu| output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/linux/bin/core-parser |
|MacOS| output/aosp/<BUILD_TYPE>/macos/bin/core-parser  |

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21.1)
project(OpenCoreAnalysisKit)
set(TARGET_CORE_PARSER core-parser)
add_definitions(-D__CORE_PARSER__="${TARGET_CORE_PARSER}")

file(READ ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/VERSION version_contents)
string(REGEX MATCH "MAJOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(MAJOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
string(REGEX MATCH "MINOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(MINOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
string(REGEX MATCH "PATCH=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(PATCH ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
add_definitions(-D__PARSER_VERSION__="${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}")

function(get_git_revision_variable VAR)
    find_package(Git QUIET)
    if(GIT_FOUND AND EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git")
        execute_process(
            COMMAND ${GIT_EXECUTABLE} describe --tags --always --dirty
            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
            OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_VERSION
            ERROR_QUIET
            OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
        )
        set(${VAR} "${GIT_VERSION}" PARENT_SCOPE)
    else()
        set(${VAR} "unknown" PARENT_SCOPE)
    endif()
endfunction()
get_git_revision_variable(GIT_VERSION)
add_definitions(-D__GIT_VERSION__="${GIT_VERSION}")

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_PRODUCT}" TARGET_BUILD_PRODUCT)
add_definitions(-D__${TARGET_BUILD_PRODUCT}_PARSER__)
add_definitions(-D__TARGET_PARSER__="${CMAKE_BUILD_PRODUCT}")

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_TARGET}" TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM)
add_definitions(-D__${TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM}__)

if (ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "arm64-v8a")
add_definitions(-D__ARM64__)
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi-v7a")
add_definitions(-D__ARM__)
add_definitions(-D__LP32__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi")

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21.1)
project(OpenCoreAnalysisKit)
set(TARGET_CORE_PARSER core-parser)
add_definitions(-D__CORE_PARSER__="${TARGET_CORE_PARSER}")

file(READ ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/VERSION version_contents)
string(REGEX MATCH "MAJOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(MAJOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
string(REGEX MATCH "MINOR=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(MINOR ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
string(REGEX MATCH "PATCH=([0-9]+)" _ ${version_contents})
set(PATCH ${CMAKE_MATCH_1})
add_definitions(-D__PARSER_VERSION__="${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}")

function(get_git_revision_variable VAR)
    find_package(Git QUIET)
    if(GIT_FOUND AND EXISTS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/.git")
        execute_process(
            COMMAND ${GIT_EXECUTABLE} describe --tags --always --dirty
            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
            OUTPUT_VARIABLE GIT_VERSION
            ERROR_QUIET
            OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
        )
        set(${VAR} "${GIT_VERSION}" PARENT_SCOPE)
    else()
        set(${VAR} "unknown" PARENT_SCOPE)
    endif()
endfunction()
get_git_revision_variable(GIT_VERSION)
add_definitions(-D__GIT_VERSION__="${GIT_VERSION}")

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_PRODUCT}" TARGET_BUILD_PRODUCT)
add_definitions(-D__${TARGET_BUILD_PRODUCT}_PARSER__)
add_definitions(-D__TARGET_PARSER__="${CMAKE_BUILD_PRODUCT}")

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_TARGET}" TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM)
add_definitions(-D__${TARGET_BUILD_PLATFORM}__)

if (ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "arm64-v8a")
add_definitions(-D__ARM64__)
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi-v7a")
add_definitions(-D__ARM__)
add_definitions(-D__LP32__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "armeabi")
add_definitions(-D__ARM__)
add_definitions(-D__LP32__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "x86_64")
add_definitions(-D__X86_64__)
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "x86")
add_definitions(-D__X86__)
add_definitions(-D__LP32__)
elseif(ANDROID_ABI STREQUAL "riscv64")
add_definitions(-D__RISCV64__)
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
endif()

if(CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 8)
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
elseif(CMAKE_SIZEOF_VOID_P EQUAL 4)
add_definitions(-D__LP32__)
else()
add_definitions(-D__LP64__)
endif()

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}" TARGET_BUILD_TYPE)
add_definitions(-D__PARSER_${TARGET_BUILD_TYPE}__)

string(TOUPPER "${CMAKE_BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE}" TARGET_BUILD_PAGESIZE)

if (TARGET_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "RELEASE")
set(OPTIMIZED_LEVEL "-O3")
else()
set(OPTIMIZED_LEVEL "-O2")
endif()
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -std=gnu++17 ${OPTIMIZED_LEVEL} -fPIC")

set(CAPSTONE_LIB_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/../3rd-party/capstone)
set(CAPSTONE_INCLUDE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/3rd-party/capstone/include)
add_library(capstone STATIC IMPORTED)
set_target_properties(capstone PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${CAPSTONE_LIB_DIR}/libcapstone.a)
include_directories(${CAPSTONE_INCLUDE_DIR})

if (NOT EXISTS "${CAPSTONE_LIB_DIR}/libcapstone.a")

if [ -z "$SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS" ];then
    export SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS="10 11 12 13 14 15 16 17 18"
fi
for COMPILER_CLANG_VERSION in $SUPPORT_CLANG_VERSIONS
do
if command -v clang-$COMPILER_CLANG_VERSION &> /dev/null
then
export BUILD_HOST_C_COMPILER="clang-$COMPILER_CLANG_VERSION"
export BUILD_HOST_CXX_COMPILER="clang++-$COMPILER_CLANG_VERSION"
fi
done
if [ -z $BUILD_TYPE ];then
    export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
fi
export BUILD_PRODUCT="aosp"
export BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE_4K="4K"
export BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE_16K="16K"
export BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE_LINUX=$BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE_4K
export INSTALL_OUTPUT=output/$BUILD_PRODUCT/"$(echo $BUILD_TYPE | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"

git submodule update --init --recursive

# build capstone
cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_C_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_CXX_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE \
      -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON \
      3rd-party/capstone/CMakeLists.txt \
      -B $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/capstone

make -C $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/capstone -j8

# build xz-utils
cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_C_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_CXX_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE \
      -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON \
      -DXZ_NLS=OFF \
      3rd-party/xz-utils/CMakeLists.txt \
      -B $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/xz-utils

make -C $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/xz-utils -j8

# build zstd
cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_C_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_CXX_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE \
      -DCMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=ON \
      3rd-party/zstd/build/cmake/CMakeLists.txt \
      -B $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/zstd

make -C $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/3rd-party/zstd -j8

# build core-parser
cmake -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_C_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=$BUILD_HOST_CXX_COMPILER \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_PRODUCT=$BUILD_PRODUCT \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=$BUILD_TYPE \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TARGET=linux \
      -DCMAKE_BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE=$BUILD_TARGET_PAGESIZE_LINUX \
      CMakeLists.txt \
      -B $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/bin

make -C $INSTALL_OUTPUT/linux/bin -j8

Usage: core-parser [OPTION]

    -c, --core <COREFILE>    load core-parser from corefile

        --page_size <SIZE>   set target core page size
        --no-load            no auto load corefile
        --no-fake-phdr [EXE] rebuild fakecore phdr

    core-parser -c /tmp/tmp.core

Key findings:
1. This is a C++ project (not Python) for Android coredump analysis
2. It's CMake-based with clang builds
3. It targets Android SDK 21-37 (API levels)
4. The main binary is `core-parser` 
5. Key directory structure:
   - `parser/` - main C++ implementation
   - `android/` - Android ART runtime mirroring code
   - `3rd-party/` - capstone, xz-utils, zstd dependencies
   - `script/` - build scripts
6. Commands are registered via CommandManager (not Python CLI)
7. Supports x86_64, arm64, arm, x86, riscv64 architectures
8. MCP and HTTP server modes available

input.content:
# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Project Overview

OpenCoreAnalysisKit is a C++ tool for analyzing Android coredumps and tombstones. It parses ELF core files and provides commands to inspect Java heap objects, ART runtime state, threads, and memory regions. The primary binary is `core-parser`.

## Build Commands

```bash
# Ubuntu
./script/build.sh

# MacOS
./script/build_macos.sh

# Android NDK
export ANDROID_NDK_HOME=<NDK_DIR>
./script/build_android.sh

# Optional: Debug build
export BUILD_TYPE="Debug"
./script/build.sh
```

Output binaries go to `output/aosp/<debug|release>/<platform>/bin/core-parser`.

## Architecture

```
OpenCoreAnalysisKit/
├── parser/              # Main C++ implementation
│   ├── core_parser.cpp # Entry point, CLI parsing, command registration
│   ├── command/        # All REPL commands (class, space, thread, etc.)
│   ├── daemon/         # HTTP and MCP server modes
│   └── ui/             # UI thread handling
├── android/            # Android ART runtime mirroring (AOSP mirror)
│   ├── android.cpp/h   # Android version detection, basic types
│   ├── art/            # ART object model mirroring
│   │   ├── dex/        # DEX file format parsing
│   │   └── runtime/    # Runtime, mirror::Class, ArtMethod, etc.
│   └── ...
├── 3rd-party/          # capstone, xz-utils, zstd (git submodules)
└── script/             # Build scripts
```

## Key Concepts

- **core-parser**: The main executable; loads coredump files via `-c <file>`, `-p <pid>`, or `-t <tombstone>`
- **ART Runtime mirroring**: `android/art/runtime/mirror/*.h` mirrors AOSP's `art/runtime/mirror/` for object layout access
- **Command system**: Commands are C++ classes registered via `CommandManager`. Run `help` in the REPL to see all commands.
- **Heap walking**: `space` command iterates Java heap regions; `top` shows object statistics; `class` searches for class instances
- **MCP mode**: Run `core-parser --mcp` for AI assistant integration via stdio
- **HTTP mode**: Run `core-parser --http [ip:port]` for REST API server

## CLI Usage

```bash
core-parser -c <corfile>           # Load from coredump file
core-parser -p <pid> -m arm64      # Attach to live process (Linux only)
core-parser -t <tombstone>         # Load from tombstone file
core-parser --sdk 34               # Force Android SDK version
core-parser --sysroot <dir>        # Symbol sysroot path
```

## Important Notes

- HeapReference fields in ART objects are always 4 bytes (32-bit compressed refs) even on 64-bit hosts
- String data is inline at `obj+16`, not a pointer — UTF-16 if bit 0 of count is set, Latin-1 otherwise
- Class names use descriptor format (`Ljava/lang/String;`) in ART internals
- The project uses git submodules — run `git submodule update --init --recursive` after clone

content.text:
## space 命令实现流程

```
用户输入 "space" 或 "space --check --app"
         │
         ▼
SpaceCommand::prepare()          [parser/command/android/cmd_space.cpp:29]
  - 解析命令行参数 (-c/--check, -f/--full-check, --app/--zygote/--image/--fake)
  - 设置 options.flag ( EACH_APP_OBJECTS | EACH_ZYGOTE_OBJECTS | EACH_IMAGE_OBJECTS | EACH_FAKE_OBJECTS )
  - 调用 Android::Prepare() 初始化 ART 运行时
  - 返回 ONCHLD 状态
         │
         ▼
SpaceCommand::main()             [cmd_space.cpp:90]
         │
         ├─── 无 --check 参数：遍历并打印所有 space
         │         │
         │         ▼
         │    art::Runtime::Current().GetHeap()
         │         │
         │         ▼
         │    heap.GetContinuousSpaces()      [android/art/runtime/gc/heap.cpp:116]
         │         │  └── 从 continuous_spaces_cache (cxx::vector<ContinuousSpace*>)
         │         │      遍历创建具体子类 (RegionSpace/ImageSpace/ZygoteSpace/...)
         │         ▼
         │    heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()  [heap.cpp:160]
         │         └── 遍历 LargeObjectSpace 等离散空间
         │         │
         │         ▼
         │    LOGI 打印: TYPE + REGION范围 + ADDRESS + NAME
         │         │
         │    输出示例:
         │      5  [0x12c00000, 0x2ac00000)  0x75db0d608820  main space (region space)
         │      0  [0x70209000, 0x7033d840)  0x75dbad608430  /system/framework/x86_64/boot.art
         │
         └─── 有 --check 参数：检查坏对象
                   │
                   ▼
              JavaVerify verify
              verify.init(options.verify, options.flag)
                   │
                   ▼
              Android::ForeachObjects(callback, options.flag, true)
                   │
                   ▼
              verify.verify(object) 逐一验证对象有效性
                   │
                   ▼
              verify.verifyMethods() 验证方法完整性
```

### 关键数据结构

**Heap** (`android/art/runtime/gc/heap.h:37`)
- `continuous_spaces_` / `discontinuous_spaces_` 是 `cxx::vector` 容器，存储 ART space 指针
- `GetContinuousSpaces()` 将通用 ContinuousSpace 指针转换为具体子类 (RegionSpace, ImageSpace, etc.)

**SpaceType 枚举** (`space.h:55`)
```
kSpaceTypeFakeSpace = -2
kSpaceTypeImageSpace    (boot.art 等)
kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace   
kSpaceTypeRegionSpace   (主堆，type=5)
kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace (离散大对象空间)
```

**cmd_space.h:22** — SpaceCommand 继承自 Command，`prepare()` 做参数解析，`main()` 执行实际遍历逻辑。

content.text:
## ContinuousSpaces vs DiscontinuousSpaces

### 空间类型总览

```
ContinuousSpaces (连续空间)           DiscontinuousSpaces (离散空间)
├── RegionSpace (kSpaceTypeRegionSpace)   └── LargeObjectSpace (kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace)
├── ImageSpace (kSpaceTypeImageSpace)          ├── LargeObjectMapSpace (MemMap式)
├── ZygoteSpace (kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace)        └── FreeListSpace (FreeList式)
├── BumpPointerSpace (kSpaceTypeBumpPointerSpace)
└── MallocSpace (kSpaceTypeMallocSpace)
        ├── RosAllocSpace
        └── DlMallocSpace
```

---

### ContinuousSpaces（连续空间）

**特点**: 对象在内存中连续存放，有连续的地址范围 `[begin, end)`，适合高效分配和遍历

| 类型 | 存储内容 | 特点 | 典型 VMA 区域 |
|------|---------|------|--------------|
| **RegionSpace** | App 运行时新分配的对象 | CMS/G1GC 的主要堆空间，按 Region 管理；每个 region 默认 512KB~1MB | `main space (region space)` — Java Heap 主区域，地址范围如 `[0x12c00000, 0x2ac00000)` |
| **ImageSpace** | boot.art / boot-*.art 等预编译的 Oat/dex 镜像 | 开机时加载，包含已编译的类和方法；只读 | `/system/framework/x86_64/boot.art` 等 |
| **ZygoteSpace** | Zygote 进程fork前预分配的对象 | Zygote 空间在 fork 后变成只读共享 | `Zygote space` |
| **BumpPointerSpace** | 临时/短期对象 | 指针碰撞分配，简单高效 | 较少见 |
| **MallocSpace** (RosAlloc/DlMalloc) | 各种运行时对象 | 传统的 dlmalloc/rosalloc 分配器 | `main rosalloc space` / `non moving space` |

---

### DiscontinuousSpaces（离散空间）

**特点**: 对象不连续存储，通过映射表管理，适合大对象

| 类型 | 存储内容 | 特点 | 典型 VMA 区域 |
|------|---------|------|--------------|
| **LargeObjectMapSpace** | > region 大小的对象（如大数组、大 bitmap） | 通过 `cxx::map<LargeObject>` 管理；对象独立映射 | `mem map large object space` |
| **FreeListSpace** | 大对象 + 空闲链表管理 | 用 AllocationInfo 链表记录空闲块 | `free list large object space` |

---

### 核心区别

| | ContinuousSpaces | DiscontinuousSpaces |
|---|---|---|
| **内存布局** | 连续地址范围 `[begin, end)` | 无统一范围，通过 large_objects map 索引 |
| **分配方式** | Bump pointer / RosAlloc / DlMalloc | 离散映射 |
| **适用对象** | 普通大小对象 (< 512KB) | **大对象** (large object > region size) |
| **遍历方式** | 线性扫描 region 或 bitmap | 遍历 `cxx::map<LargeObject>` |
| **GC 行为** | 移动存活对象 (evacuation) | 一般不移动，通过映射表管理 |
| **空间类型** | kSpaceTypeRegionSpace, ImageSpace, ZygoteSpace, BumpPointerSpace, MallocSpace | kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace |

---

### 与 Process Maps / VMA 的对应关系

以 x86_64 emulator (SDK 34) 的 `space` 命令输出为例：

```
TYPE   REGION                  ADDRESS             NAME
  5  [0x12c00000, 0x2ac00000)  0x75db0d608820  main space (region space)    ← Java Heap 主区域 (RegionSpace)
  0  [0x70209000, 0x7033d840)  0x75dbad608430  /system/framework/x86_64/boot.art    ← ImageSpace
  0  [0x704c2000, 0x704dfc88)  0x75dbad6086f0  /system/framework/x86_64/boot-core-libart.art  ← ImageSpace
```

对应到 `/proc/self/maps`：

```
70209000-7033d000 r--p  /system/framework/x86_64/boot.art     ← ImageSpace (只读, 映射 boot.art)
704c2000-704e0000 r--p  /system/framework/x86_64/boot-core-libart.art  ← ImageSpace
...
12c00000-2ac00000 rw-p  [anon:heap]                 ← RegionSpace (Java Heap, 读写匿名区域)
```

**关键点**: Java Heap 的 RegionSpace 是匿名映射 `[anon:heap]`，而不是文件映射。而 ImageSpace 则映射到 `/system/framework/.../boot*.art` 文件。

**LargeObjectSpace (Discontinuous)** 在 process maps 中表现为多个独立的匿名映射段，每个大对象有自己单独的 `mmap` 区域。

content.text:
## class 命令实现流程

```
用户输入 "class android.app.Activity" 或 "class 0x71c530a0"
         │
         ▼
ClassCommand::prepare()           [parser/command/android/cmd_class.cpp:29]
  - 解析参数: -m/--method, -s/--static, -i/--impl, -f/--field, -x/--hex
  - 支持 --app/--zygote/--image/--fake 过滤不同 space
  - 设置 options.show_flag (SHOW_METHOD | SHOW_IMPL | SHOW_STATIC | SHOW_FIELD)
  - 如果指定了 classname 则 options.dump_all = false
  - 调用 Android::Prepare() 初始化 ART
  - 返回 ONCHLD
         │
         ▼
ClassCommand::main()             [cmd_class.cpp:105]
         │
         ├─── 输入是地址 (如 0x71c530a0)
         │         │
         │         ▼
         │    obj = Utils::atol(argv[optind])
         │    obj.IsValid() && obj.IsClass() ?
         │         │
         │    ├─── Yes → 直接 PrintPrettyClassContent(clazz, options)
         │    └─── No  → Fallback 到 Android::ForeachObjects 搜索
         │
         └─── 输入是类名 (如 "android.app.Activity")
                   │
                   ▼
              Android::ForeachObjects(callback, obj_each_flags, false)
                         │
                         ▼
              callback = [&](object) → PrintClass(object, classname)
                         │
                         ▼
              For each space in heap.GetContinuousSpaces():
              │   ImageSpace    → if (flag & EACH_IMAGE_OBJECTS)   space->Walk(fn, check)
              │   ZygoteSpace   → if (flag & EACH_ZYGOTE_OBJECTS)  space->Walk(fn, check)
              │   RegionSpace   → if (flag & EACH_APP_OBJECTS)     space->Walk(fn, check)
              │   BumpPointer   → if (flag & EACH_APP_OBJECTS)     space->Walk(fn, check)
              │   MallocSpace   → if (flag & EACH_APP_OBJECTS)     space->Walk(fn, check)
              │   FakeSpace     → if (flag & EACH_FAKE_OBJECTS)    space->Walk(fn, check)
              │
              For each space in heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces():
              └── LargeObjectSpace → if (flag & EACH_APP_OBJECTS) space->Walk(fn, check)
                         │
                         ▼
              PrintClass(object, classname)   [cmd_class.cpp:129]
                         │
                         ▼
              if (!object.IsClass()) return false;
              thiz = object
                   │
                   ├─── options.dump_all == true (无类名，列出所有)
                   │         │
                   │         ▼
                   │    total_classes++
                   │    LOGI("[N] 0xADDR Ljava/lang/Object;")
                   │    if (show_flag) PrintPrettyClassContent()
                   │
                   └─── options.dump_all == false (指定类名)
                             │
                             ▼
                        if (thiz.PrettyDescriptor() == classname)
                             │
                             ▼
                        PrintPrettyClassContent(thiz, options)
                                 │
                                 ▼
                        ┌─ 打印类头: "public final class X extends Y {"
                        ├─ SHOW_IMPL → iftable 遍历打印实现的接口
                        ├─ SHOW_STATIC → ForeachStaticField → 排序 → PrintField
                        ├─ SHOW_FIELD → 遍历父类链 GetSuperClass()
                        │     → ForeachInstanceField → 排序 → PrintField
                        ├─ SHOW_METHOD → ForeachArtMethods → PrintMethod
                        └─ 打印 "}"
```

### 关键数据结构

**ClassCommand** (`cmd_class.h:25`)
- `Options.dump_all`: true = 列出所有类，false = 搜索指定类名/地址
- `Options.show_flag`: `SHOW_METHOD | SHOW_IMPL | SHOW_STATIC | SHOW_FIELD`
- `PrintClass()`: 每个对象的回调，检测是否是 Class 对象并匹配
- `PrintPrettyClassContent()`: 详细打印类的字段/方法/接口

**mirror::Class** (`android/art/runtime/mirror/class.h:92`)
- `class_loader_`, `name_`, `super_class_`, `iftable_` 等字段
- `GetSuperClass()`, `GetIfTable()`, `NumMethods()`, `NumStaticFields()`, `NumInstanceFields()`
- `PrettyDescriptor()`: 返回 "Landroid/app/Activity;" 格式的类名

**Android::ForeachObjects** (`android/android.cpp:385`)
- 遍历 heap 的所有 ContinuousSpaces 和 DiscontinuousSpaces
- 根据 flag 过滤要检查的 space 类型
- 调用 `space->Walk(fn, check)` 对每个对象执行回调

**Space::Walk** — 具体遍历实现由每个 Space 子类提供
- `RegionSpace::Walk()`: 按 region 线性扫描，跳过大对象区域
- `ImageSpace::Walk()`: 遍历 boot.art 中的类
- `LargeObjectMapSpace::Walk()`: 遍历 cxx::map 中的大对象
